analysis.summary: Metabase is an open-source business intelligence and data visualization platform that enables users to explore, query, and visualize data from multiple databases through web interfaces, dashboards, and embedded analytics.
capabilities: Provides web-based query builder for non-SQL users (frontend/src/metabase/query_builder/)
Executes SQL queries through native editor interface (frontend/src/metabase/native/)
Generates interactive dashboards with filters and visualizations (frontend/src/metabase/dashboard/)
Embeds charts and dashboards in external applications (frontend/src/metabase/public/)
Connects to multiple database types through driver architecture (modules/drivers/)
Provides REST API for programmatic access (src/metabase/api/)
Manages user authentication and permissions (src/metabase/models/permissions/)
Processes and caches query results (src/metabase/query_processor/)
Schedules automated reports and alerts (src/metabase/task/)
Provides embedding SDK for React applications (@metabase/embedding-sdk-react)
integrations: Multiple databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, Snowflake drivers)

technical_facts: Provides web-based query builder for non-SQL users (frontend/src/metabase/query_builder/)
Executes SQL queries through native editor interface (frontend/src/metabase/native/)
Generates interactive dashboards with filters and visualizations (frontend/src/metabase/dashboard/)
Embeds charts and dashboards in external applications (frontend/src/metabase/public/)
Connects to multiple database types through driver architecture (modules/drivers/)
Provides REST API for programmatic access (src/metabase/api/)
Manages user authentication and permissions (src/metabase/models/permissions/)
Processes and caches query results (src/metabase/query_processor/)
Schedules automated reports and alerts (src/metabase/task/)
Provides embedding SDK for React applications (@metabase/embedding-sdk-react)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: JVM-based with Clojure core.async for async operations, JavaScript event loop for frontend

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Processes and caches query results (src/metabase/query_processor/), Connects to multiple database types through driver architecture (modules/drivers/), Generates interactive dashboards with filters and visualizations (frontend/src/metabase/dashboard/)
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: REST API endpoints with defined schemas (src/metabase/api/), Table schema information endpoint (/api/table/:id/query_metadata), Multiple database driver architecture requiring structured data contracts
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Executes SQL queries through native editor interface (frontend/src/metabase/native/), Database connection management (/api/database), Create/update saved questions (/api/card)
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Processes and caches query results (src/metabase/query_processor/), Connects to multiple database types including PostgreSQL and MySQL which require ACID compliance, User authentication and permissions management
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to modular architecture with driver abstraction layer, REST API design, and clear separation between query processing, visualization, and authentication components. The dashboard and visualization components are domain-agnostic.

evidence_claims.evidence: Connects to multiple database types through driver architecture (modules/drivers/)
Embeds charts and dashboards in external applications (frontend/src/metabase/public/), Provides embedding SDK for React applications (@metabase/embedding-sdk-react)
Provides REST API for programmatic access (src/metabase/api/)
